final:
module top_module(
    input in,
    output reg out,  // Change the output declaration to reg
    input clk
);reg prev_in;
    
    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (in && !prev_in) begin out <= 1'b1 ; end else begin out <= 1'b0 ; end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  prev_in <= in ;
  end
    
endmodule
